LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine_BattleTrance.label: battle trance cadence
LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine_BattleTrance.description:
This warspine locks the host into a ritualized combat rhythm, suppressing hesitation and driving cleaner, more decisive attack sequencing.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine.label: indomitable warspine
LanguageData.EM_BraveSpine.description:
This spine keeps physical might and indomitable spirit online as a stable front-line baseline. Linked effects trigger by pressure: combat mastery in live combat, high-stage vital ascendance below 65% health, and battle trance while drafted.
created/edited by easyrim
